name: review
description: Code review team — security, performance, and architecture specialists

agents.name: security-reviewer
agents.focus: OWASP top 10, auth flows, input validation, secrets exposure, injection vectors

agents.name: perf-reviewer
agents.focus: N+1 queries, unnecessary re-renders, large bundle imports, missing indexes, memory leaks

agents.name: arch-reviewer
agents.focus: SOLID violations, coupling, abstraction leaks, inconsistent patterns, dead code

task_template: Review the changes in `git diff {base_branch}...HEAD` focusing on {agent.focus}. Report issues as: [SEVERITY] file:line — description. Severity levels: CRITICAL (must fix), IMPORTANT (should fix), MINOR (consider fixing).
